meta.title: Subscribe — Saúl de León
meta.description: Subscribe to get notified when new posts are published.
title: Subscribe
subtitle: Get an email whenever a new post is published.
successMessage: A confirmation email to {{email}} has been sent. Click the link inside to activate your subscription.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
email.subject: Confirm your subscription
email.previewText: One click to confirm your subscription to sawl.dev.
email.heading: Confirm your subscription
email.body: Hi {{name}}! Thanks for subscribing. Click the button below to confirm your email address and activate your subscription.
email.footerText: If you didn't subscribe to this blog, you can safely ignore this email.
confirmed.title: You're subscribed!
confirmed.message: Your subscription is confirmed. You'll receive an email whenever a new post is published.
confirmed.error: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used.
unsubscribed.title: You've been unsubscribed.
unsubscribed.message: You'll no longer receive emails from this blog.
notification.subject: New post: {{title}}
notification.previewText: A new post has been published on sawl.dev.
notification.teaser: A new post has just been published.
notification.heading: New post
notification.footerText: You're receiving this because you subscribed to sawl.dev.
